reason: Fixed both plan-adherence review findings: (1) Added react-hook-form + zod with a BookingFormData schema, wired into the booking form with validation and error display. (2) Updated RestaurantListPage to use shadcn Card/Badge/Button components, and BookingsListPage to use shadcn Table/Card components. All verification passes: backend build (0 warnings), 25 tests pass, dotnet format clean, frontend build/typecheck/lint/format:check/deadcode all pass.
